project_name: Embedded Firmware Engineer for Low-Power BLE Device with Wake Word Detection
job_title: Embedded Firmware Engineer for Low-Power BLE Device with Wake Word Detection
key_features: Wake word detection, BLE communication, microphone integration, LED and buzzer control, low-power battery optimization

milestone_2_desc: BLE stack integration with microphone capture and event routing
milestone_3_desc: Low-power optimization, LED/buzzer behavior, and validation tests
